name: plan052-fos-career-priority-detail-dashboard
description: Add a read-only fos-career priority detail view for frontdoor queue and ledger records.
recommended_defaults: Use record type plus record id to address both frontdoor queue and ledger rows.
Show user-confirmed priority before recommendation snapshot values.
Render recommendation snapshot, posting/fit/gap details, preparation actions, evidence URLs, and priority history.
Do not introduce DB migrations or career-os writes.
